heading: Provisional remedies
label: 9004 Provisional remedies
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to , The Public Health and Welfare.section 11604 of Title 42

children.heading: Authority of courts
children.label: a Authority of courts
children.text: In furtherance of the objectives of article 7(b) and other provisions of the Convention, and subject to the provisions of subsection (b) of this section, any court exercising jurisdiction of an action brought under may take or cause to be taken measures under Federal or State law, as appropriate, to protect the well-being of the child involved or to prevent the child’s further removal or concealment before the final disposition of the petition.section 9003(b) of this title

children.heading: Limitation on authority
children.label: b Limitation on authority
children.text: No court exercising jurisdiction of an action brought under may, under subsection (a) of this section, order a child removed from a person having physical control of the child unless the applicable requirements of State law are satisfied.section 9003(b) of this title
